description: Non-normative well-known conversion event names for AgentOffer conversion goals. These names are interoperability recommendations only and are not required for validation; protocol validation never depends on this file. display_label is a presentation seed.

well_known_events.description: The user installs or first opens the promoted app.
The user completes a paid purchase or order.
The user submits a lead form, registration, or qualified inquiry.
The user starts or converts into a subscription.
The user starts a free trial or trial-like activation.
